description: Generalization splits for Benchmark v2, covering seen/unseen compositions, single/multi-platform, static/dynamic, known/novel aliases, and text-only/text+sketch modalities.

seen_templates.description: Tasks whose source demos are from domains already present in benchmark IR examples, with familiar template patterns.

unseen_compositions.description: Tasks using components or combinations not seen in benchmark — new domains (swarm, gun_engagement, bistatic radar, JTIDS) or novel component compositions.

single_platform.description: Scenarios with a single platform type or minimal entity count.

multi_platform.description: Scenarios with multiple platform types, formations, or cross-side interactions.

static_deployment.description: Tasks focused on platform/component deployment and configuration without dynamic mission logic.

dynamic_mission.description: Tasks involving time-based mission logic, engagement, or dynamic behavior.

known_alias.description: Tasks using standard English/Chinese aliases already covered in entity_mapping_v2.

novel_alias.description: Tasks that introduce novel component names or domain-specific aliases not yet in entity_mapping (swarm, gun_engagement, bistatic, JTIDS).

text_only.description: Tasks defined purely by natural-language text input.

text_plus_sketch.description: Reserved for future tasks that include sketch/diagram input alongside text.
